title: Sakana: Fable 5 Intelligence WITHOUT Fable 5!
summary: Sakana released Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a standard and higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. The system is accessible via a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude and others on benchmarks.
writeup: The video covers Sakana's release of Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system offered in a standard version and a higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis to combine multiple model responses. It matters because the system is accessible through a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude on benchmarks, suggesting frontier-level results without a single frontier model. The key takeaways: orchestration across multiple models, synthesis of their outputs at the panel level, and benchmark parity claims delivered through one API endpoint.
